meta.title: Our Locations
meta.description: From the Toni Dairy to today – the story of our spaces and our vision for a new community hub in Zurich.

hero.title: From Dairy to Community Space
hero.subtitle: Since 2003, we've been moving around Zurich. Now we're searching for a new home – a place where sustainability, technology and community come together.

history.title: Our Journey Through Zurich
history.subtitle: Over 20 years, multiple locations, one mission: using technology sustainably.

locations.name: Toni Dairy
locations.description: Our birthplace in the old cheese cellar. This is where the legendary Debian 10th anniversary party happened on the roof.

locations.name: Reformed Church Wipkingen
locations.description: On the 6th/7th floor of the church tower and in the cellars. This is where our first social projects started.

locations.name: Röschibachstrasse
locations.description: A large space with many workstations. Expansion of our workshop.

future.title: Our Dream Location
future.subtitle: We need to leave our current premises by the end of 2026. This is our chance to create something bigger.
future.visionDescription: An open space where technology, sustainability and community come together. Shop, workshop, coworking, events – all under one roof.
future.conceptCaption: Concept visualisation of our ideal community space

features.name: Shop Area
features.description: Exhibition space for refurbished devices with expert advice

features.name: Repair Workshop
features.description: Workstations for technicians and community repairs

features.name: Event Space
features.description: Room for workshops, meetups and small events (15–20 people)

features.name: Mini Library
features.description: A few shelves of tech books, magazines and resources

features.name: Coffee Corner
features.description: Meeting point for informal exchange and networking

features.name: Kitchen
features.description: Fully equipped kitchen for zero food waste initiatives

params.title: What We're Looking For
params.subtitle: The parameters for our ideal location
params.idealText: Ground floor or easily accessible, wheelchair-accessible, loading bay or delivery access, in a vibrant neighbourhood with good public transport links.
params.tipText: Know a suitable space? We'd love to hear from you!

impact.title: Why a Bigger Space Means More Impact
impact.subtitle: With more space, we can multiply our KPIs – save more devices, train more people, achieve more impact.

items.reason: Dedicated event space for regular courses
More internship places with larger premises

donateCta.title: Support Our Location Fund
donateCta.description: With a bigger budget, we can find a better location – and multiply our impact on the environment and society. Every contribution helps us realise our dream of a community space.

shopLinks.title: All Shopping Options
shopLinks.subtitle: In-person and online – choose what suits you best.
